name: SKILL-CHECKLIST-RUNNER
description: Validate any work against a .md checklist. Yolo (autonomous) or interactive mode. Emits a clear pass/fail/partial verdict.
when_to_use: Before deploying, merging, or delivering any work — to ensure all quality criteria have been met.

command.claude_ai: Run a checklist validation on the work described. For each item: 1) Check if it is satisfied, 2) Mark as PASS / FAIL / PARTIAL, 3) Explain why if not passing, 4) At the end, give an overall verdict and list all failing items.

author: fluxrow
